db-transfer-transaction.setup:
CREATE TABLE accounts(id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, balance INTEGER);
            INSERT INTO accounts(id, balance) VALUES (1, 100), (2, 80);
db-transfer-transaction.check_sql: SELECT id, balance FROM accounts ORDER BY id;

db-insert-daily-report.setup: CREATE TABLE reports(day TEXT, total INTEGER);
db-insert-daily-report.check_sql: SELECT day, total FROM reports ORDER BY day;

db-update-null-phone.check_sql: SELECT name, phone FROM users ORDER BY name;

db-delete-cancelled-orders.check_sql: SELECT id, status FROM orders ORDER BY id;

db-upsert-daily-kpi.setup:
CREATE TABLE kpi(day TEXT PRIMARY KEY, total INTEGER);
            INSERT INTO kpi(day, total) VALUES ('2026-04-01', 3);
db-upsert-daily-kpi.check_sql: SELECT day, total FROM kpi ORDER BY day;
